basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) has released the official Field Investigator Notification 2026 under Advt. No. NITW/HSS/ICSSR-RS26005/2026/01/. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the NIT Warangal Field Investigator Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding a Graduate degree in any Humanities or Social Sciences discipline with a minimum of 55% marks are eligible to apply through email on or before 07 August 2026. Candidates should refer to the official notification for age limit and walk-in interview details. The official notification PDF and application detail

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any humanities or social sciences discipline, Minimum 55% marks in UG degree
qualification.details: Graduate in any humanities or social sciences discipline. Minimum 55% marks in UG degree. Preference will be given to candidates with a four-year graduation programme.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Field Investigator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Warangal Field Investigator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Graduate in any humanities or social sciences discipline. Minimum 55% marks in UG degree. Preference will be given to candidates with a four-year graduation programme.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Field Investigator post at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Field Investigator position at NIT Warangal is 07 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in any humanities or social sciences discipline with a minimum of 55% marks in their undergraduate degree. A four-year graduation program is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Field Investigator post announced by the National Institute of Technology Warangal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Field Investigator post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is via email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Field Investigator recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Warangal located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Field Investigator position at NIT Warangal is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
